# EMT Services

> UK event safety specialists providing SIA-licensed security, medical cover, professional stewarding and fire marshals. Owner-operated with 35 years of hands-on experience and full industry accreditation.

EMT Services is an owner-operated event safety firm working across the United Kingdom. Every event is planned and managed in strict accordance with the Purple Guide and the SGSA's Green Guide. Operatives are personally vetted by the directors and selected through trusted recommendation rather than agency hire.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of services, foundations, trust signals, accreditations, FAQs and contact.

## Services
- SIA-Licensed Security — personally vetted operatives with operational backgrounds.
- Medical & First Aid Cover — on-site medical planning and first aid (we partner with CQC-registered providers for clinical/ambulance needs).
- Professional Stewarding — crowd management, access control and customer-facing event support.
- Fire Marshals — fire safety planning, evacuation cover and on-event fire watch.

## Accreditations
- Association of Healthcare Trainers (AoHT) — Member.
- ProTrainings & Highfield — Registered training provider.
- Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) — Registered data controller.
- ResusReady — Resuscitation training partner.

## Industry Guides
- [The Purple Guide](https://www.thepurpleguide.co.uk/): Health, safety and welfare at music and other events.
- [SGSA's Green Guide](https://sgsa.org.uk/greenguide/): Guide to safety at sports grounds.

## Contact
- Email: info@emtservices.uk
- [Google Reviews](https://search.google.com/local/writereview?placeid=ChIJNX9J6nRZ344RZubXKNrTToE)
